title: QUIC Transport Bridge, Diagnostics, and Sender/Recovery Work Item
summary: Add the internal main-library seams for TLS-facing transport facts, diagnostics emission, and sender/recovery ownership.
planned_changes:
- Add an internal TLS bridge state that can represent transport parameters, key availability, handshake confirmation, key updates, old-key discard, and fatal alerts.
- Add an internal diagnostics sink abstraction with a no-op default.
- Add an internal sender/recovery runtime owner that wraps the existing sender-flow and recovery helpers.
- Add focused requirement-home tests for the new seam classes.
verification_plan: Run the new CRT requirement-home tests and the solution build/test pass that includes the new seam classes.
completion_notes: Optional implementation notes, deviations, or follow-up items.
out_of_scope: Any actual TLS stack integration, qlog format implementation, or full retransmission algorithm expansion.
